creator: decke@bluelife.at
text:
Tested with Intel 965GM chipset on 8.2-stable/amd64 and it breaks
rendering (wrong colors, nearly unusable result). From a quick look at
the code i can see that the i830 functions are called in various places
from the 965 code so they are at least also affected.

--
